name: LeTech Corporation
summary: LeTech Corporation engages in the real estate business. It is involved in the housing and commercial development, and conversion and renovation; real estate consulting; facility management; and nursing care businesses. The company also offers real estate rental Services. The company was formerly known as Legal Corporation and changed its name to LeTech Corporation in February 2021. LeTech Corporation was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
